purpose: Documentary-style Ken Burns effect: slow pan and zoom on each image with crossfade transitions. Cinematic feel. Best for investigative journalism, historical photos, witness portraits, crime scene imagery.

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Optional documentary-style title caption in top-left. Example: 'Events of March 2024'
fields.FRAMES_PER_SLIDE: How long each image is displayed in frames. Example: 120 = 4 seconds at 30fps. Default: 120
fields.TRANSITION_FRAMES: Cross-fade duration in frames. Example: 30. Default: 30
fields.IMAGE_URL_1: URL to first uploaded image. Leave as IMAGE_URL_1 if not yet uploaded.
fields.IMAGE_URL_2: URL to second uploaded image. Leave as IMAGE_URL_2 if not yet uploaded.
fields.IMAGE_URL_3: URL to third uploaded image. Leave as IMAGE_URL_3 if not yet uploaded.
fields.IMAGE_URL_4: URL to fourth uploaded image. Leave as IMAGE_URL_4 if not yet uploaded.
fields.IMAGE_URL_5: URL to fifth uploaded image. Leave as IMAGE_URL_5 if not yet uploaded.
fields.IMAGE_URL_6: URL to sixth uploaded image. Leave as IMAGE_URL_6 if not yet uploaded.
fields.CAPTION_1: Italic caption for first image. Example: 'Server room, Building C, 2nd floor'
fields.SUGGESTION_1: Describe exactly what photo or screenshot the user should upload for slot 1. Be specific. Example: 'Upload a portrait or headshot photo of the key witness'
fields.SUGGESTION_2: Describe what to upload for slot 2. Example: 'Upload a wide-angle photo of the office or location'
fields.SUGGESTION_3: Describe what to upload for slot 3. Leave blank if only 2 images are needed.
fields.SUGGESTION_4: Describe what to upload for slot 4. Leave blank if fewer than 4 images are needed.
fields.SUGGESTION_5: Describe what to upload for slot 5. Leave blank if fewer than 5 images are needed.
fields.SUGGESTION_6: Describe what to upload for slot 6. Leave blank if fewer than 6 images are needed.
